evidence: drsam-99657.bubble — /api/bTHzi (custom event bTHzg): TerminateWorkflow thresholds 3.2/3.8 and orientation_score <= 3 for comfortable_plateau
drsam-99657.bubble — bTHzC TriggerCustomEvent bTHzg then ChangeThing bTIAc sets classification_option_classification_os from bTHzt

functional_audit.check: resolveClassification implements Bubble bTHzi ordered threshold branches (not prototype classification.ts computeClassification)
evidence: frontend/src/lib/classification.ts — computeClassification uses pressure-profile heuristics; classifyUser.ts is independent

functional_audit.check: calculateUserClassification loads pillar/orientation scores, resolves classification_os, patches profile fields mirroring bTHzC/bTIAc
Classification calculator runs after API-01 pillar calculators during onboarding completion

critiques.finding: calculateUserClassification reads orientation_score1_number from onboarding_data, but completeOnboarding persists orientation as orientationScore (camelCase) in onboarding_data and orientation_score in results; the Bubble field key is never written to onboarding_data.
critiques.alternative: Persist orientation_score1_number in onboarding_data during AUTH-04 orientation step or completeOnboarding save, matching bTHzC user.orientation_score1_number sourcing and removing reliance on results fallback.

critiques.finding: saveOnboarding still runs computeResults (prototype classification.ts) before the pipeline overwrites classification via calculateUserClassification; transient mismatch exists between initial results.classification and Bubble-parity patch until pipeline completes.
critiques.alternative: Skip prototype classification in computeResults when runOnboardingProfilePipeline will execute immediately, or derive results.classification from resolveClassification after pillar scores are patched.

critiques.finding: No unit tests cover resolveClassification branch ordering at 3.2/3.8 boundaries or the comfortable_plateau orientation <= 3 gate.
critiques.alternative: Add classifyUser.test.ts with Bubble-derived score fixtures for each bTHzi TerminateWorkflow branch.

critiques.finding: Coverage preflight gaps[] still documents pre-rewrite AC-1/AC-2 failures even though criteria now pass.
critiques.alternative: Clear resolved gaps from preflight on the next implement coverage refresh.
